title: HOW I CREATE Hair with Xgen - Maya
description: The goal of this product, is to give you all the keys to create realistic hair in X-gen / Maya using xgen-core. From learning all the X-gen fundamentals, to create your first Haircut.

title: Introduction to XGen
description: In Introduction to XGen, you'll learn the fundamentals of working with XGen and creating your first grooms. You'll learn all the tools you must know and also how to avoid common mistakes in XGen. Later in the series, you'll learn the full process for creating a simple and professional groom from start to finish; no time-lapses. Every step will be shown.

title: Bringing Artistic Game Effects to Life with Niagara
description: Learn everything in this course, from the essentials of responsive effects, including color impressions, form, and timing of effects, to the intricacies of effect production tailored to each motion.

title: P2Design Academy - AOER² - The Art of Effective Rigging 2
description: Build production-ready character rigs with clean deformation, IK/FK systems and animator-friendly controls.

title: Introductory Game Animation Pipelines for Anime Characters
description: From creating rhythm action games for Nintendo Switch to creating mobile RPG games! The class of Yeongje Kim, a 3D game animator who is actively working in various industries, has finally arrived.

title: Mastering Ocean Simulations In Houdini
description: Your Captain is none other than the infamous, VES Award Winning artist (Shōgun), Dominic Tiedeken. He’ll guide you through the rough sees of FLIP and Oceans in houdini. Together we’ll navigate FLIP settings, WhiteWater, Foam, Spray, Meshing, fluid optimization, rendering, and so much more.

title: Introduction to Substance Painter
description: In this Introduction to Substance Painter series, you'll learn everything you need to know in order to get started with Substance Painter. The first part will get your familiar with the commonly used tools, and in the second part, we'll texture a real-world asset.

title: UV Mapping for Games
description: In UV Mapping for Games we'll tackle, in great depth, one of the most common pain-points that all 3D artists have: UV Mapping. No matter which area of game development you are in, if you interact with 3D models you will need to know about UV mapping - even if only at a fundamental level.

title: Rendering University
description: This training focuses intensely on the crucial aspects of presentation for 3D artists, aiming to elevate portfolio quality and attract professional opportunities

title: Product Design with Cinema 4D and Octane Renderer
description: Create polished product renders of various products with Cinema 4D and Octane Renderer.

title: WorldBuilder - Environment Concept Art Foundations
description: Design, block out and detail compelling environments and worlds for games and film.

title: The Ultimate Unreal Engine Course
description: No 3D Experience? No Problem! We give you a step-by-step program teaching you the most powerful 3D software, for beginners and pros who want portfolio-ready results!

title: VFX for Games in Unity
description: Use Unity's shader node features to create captivating real-time VFX for games

title: Recreate Stardew Valley in Godot
description: Create your first 2D game in Godot, covering scenes, scripting and basic UI.

title: Immersive Blender 3D Animation Completed with Lighting
description: 라이팅으로 완성하는 몰입도 높은 블렌더 3D 애니메이션. We will produce a total of 3 animations, and learn how to convey the emotions and stories of the characters in an immersive way through 8 lighting production methods.

title: Blender 3D Character Styling and Direction with 160 Practical Examples
description: Learn to create high-quality 3D characters with 160 examples! Unlock the advanced curriculum that expands your character’s style and visual storytelling. Bring the personality you’ve imagined to life and complete it as a single polished artwork. Join Minjeong Shin’s trusted class and create richly detailed, one-of-a-kind characters like never before!

title: Blender 3D Basic Training: Easy to Learn with 100 Artworks
description: 100가지 아트워크로 쉽게 익히는 블렌더 3D 기초 트레이닝. Cute profile characters, interior space configuration, and even lively animation production! See all of the emotional artwork in 3D, all in one place. Pounding, the most popular artist in the blender scene right now, will tell you all the warm and cozy artwork and production skills that are perfect for beginners.

title: Cinematic highlight production and high-density Ae motion graphic scene completion
description: 영화적인 하이라이트 연출과 밀도 높은 Ae 모션그래픽 씬 완성. The secret of 2D motion graphic artwork that catches the public's attention like a movie intro with strong directing and highlights! Starcover, a trendy motion graphics artist who has garnered 1.3 million views with his animation MV, will reveal all the secrets of directing high-quality 2D motion graphics. Experience a solid after-effects skill that will increase the density of your artwork.

title: A to Z of NPR Animation in Blender
description: Popurika, a seasoned video creator with vast experience in film, commercial, and music video production, takes you through every step of the animation production process, from initial proposals to compositing and animation. In this course, Popurika shares exclusive techniques for animation production using Blender. Learn how to create an entire project with Blender, covering everything from modeling and rigging to animation and compositing.

title: Cinematic Lighting in Blender
description: Level-up your 3D lighting skills by watching our foundational 13+ hour course - now Updated and Remastered for Blender 5.x | 2026. It’s all really simple: lighting is everything! After all in order to see ANYTHING we NEED light. As 3D artists we all know this obvious truth but we're still too often guilty of spending WAY more time on the modeling and barely a thought to the lighting when it's that which makes or breaks a scene.

title: Modeling Beautiful and Lifelike Female Characters
description: Learn the complete process of creating a realistic, aesthetic female character, exclusively revealed for the first time! Ed Pantera, a top-tier 3D character artist with 20 years of experience, shares the practical work process used across the game industry. Discover the most practical method of full-body modeling of realistic female characters, available only on Coloso.

title: Blenderで作るトゥーン調キャラクターアニメーションの全て
description: 「リトル・チャロ」を始め、これまで数々の有名アニメーション作品を生み出してきた、CG制作会社のSpooky graphic。今回の講座では、そんなプロの映像制作会社だけが教えられるノウハウを基に、３次元的な表現に2Dの要素をプラスした、CGキャラクターアニメーション制作のプロセスを公開します。

title: From Workflow to Production: A Complete Guide to Anime Creation
description: 「NARUTO ナルト 疾風伝」や「呪術廻戦」(第1期) OPなど、数々の人気アニメーション作品を手掛ける、アニメーション監督の山下清悟。今回の講座では、15年以上の商業アニメーション制作経験を持つ山下清悟ならではの、商業アニメーションのワークフローと、完成度の高いアニメーション制作方法を、段階的にお教えします。

title: Artistic Cartoon-Style Character Modeling with ZBrush
description: We prepared a curriculum comprising 102 chapters, from the utilization of ZBrush tools that extract 2D elements from 3D designs, to using the Best Preview Render (BPR) filter for rendering and exploring poses that enhance a character's charm. Create cartoon-style 3D characters that captivate audiences and grow into a 3D character modeler equipped with skills and artistic sensibilities using ZBrush alone.
